steps.action: Open /admin/categories/new and click Create Category with Name left blank
steps.expected: Validation error shown and no category created
steps.observed: Inline error 'Name is required' displayed on form; remained on /admin/categories/new

evidence.network: Only GET /api/admin/categories observed; no POST /api/admin/categories was sent (client-side validation blocked submit)
dbChecks: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE TRIM(cat_name) = '' -> 0

steps.action: Enter Name and invalid URI 'bad uri!' then submit
steps.expected: Validation rejects URI with spaces/special characters
steps.observed: Inline error 'URI may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores' shown; form not submitted

evidence.network: Only GET /api/admin/categories observed; no POST /api/admin/categories was sent for invalid URI input

assertions.title: Add category — auto-generates URI from name

steps.action: Submit category with Name='g3val auto uri 014 1773937954' and blank URI
steps.expected: Category created and URI slug auto-generated from name
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/categories after submit; DB row stored auto-generated slug

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/categories observed in browser request log during submit
dbChecks: SELECT cat_id, cat_name, cat_uri, cat_order FROM categories WHERE cat_name='g3val auto uri 014 1773937954' -> {cat_id: 8, cat_uri: 'g3val-auto-uri-014-1773937954', cat_order: 0}

steps.action: Create two categories with identical Name='g3val dup uri 015 1773937954' and blank URI
steps.expected: Second category gets unique URI suffix
steps.observed: Both rows created; first URI='g3val-dup-uri-015-1773937954', second URI='g3val-dup-uri-015-1773937954_1'

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/categories observed during both create submissions
dbChecks: SELECT cat_id, cat_name, cat_uri FROM categories WHERE cat_name='g3val dup uri 015 1773937954' ORDER BY cat_id ASC -> [{cat_id:9, cat_uri:'g3val-dup-uri-015-1773937954'}, {cat_id:10, cat_uri:'g3val-dup-uri-015-1773937954_1'}]

steps.action: Submit category with Name='g3val order blank 016 1773937954' and blank Order
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/categories; DB record saved with cat_order 0

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/categories observed in browser request log during submit
dbChecks: SELECT cat_id, cat_name, cat_uri, cat_order FROM categories WHERE cat_name='g3val order blank 016 1773937954' -> {cat_id: 11, cat_order: 0}

steps.action: Submit with oversized PNG g3val_large.png (529728 bytes)
steps.expected: Rejected with >100KB validation error and no category/file persisted
steps.observed: Stayed on /admin/categories/new with error 'Image is too large. Maximum size is 100KB (102400 bytes). File is 529728 bytes.'

steps.expected: Rejected as invalid image type and no category/file persisted
steps.observed: Stayed on /admin/categories/new with error 'Image type ".bmp" is not allowed. Allowed types: gif, jpg, jpeg, png'

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/categories observed on both rejected uploads
dbChecks: SELECT cat_id, cat_name, cat_uri FROM categories WHERE cat_name IN ('g3val image large 017 1773937954','g3val image bmp 017 1773937954') -> []
app/uploads/categories glob g3val* -> no matching files

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export lists URLs/methods but not reliable status codes and includes repeated historical entries.
frictions.resolution: Used UI outcomes (inline/toast errors and redirects) plus DB/file checks to verify assertion pass/fail criteria.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Create-form validations/defaults and image upload constraints behaved as specified for g3val_ test data.
